# **One-Page Strategy**

## **Thesis**

Short-form audio should be engineered as a behavioural system, not chosen as background decoration.

## **Core rule**

```text
Every clip needs a first-second sonic event.
```

That event can be:

```text
spoken contradiction
impact hit
trend cue
foley click
silence drop
glitch/reverse
brand sonic mark
```

## **Audio roles**

| Format | Dominant audio role | Primary metric |
|---|---|---|
| education | voice authority | saves/completion |
| meme | trend/template | shares/replay/comments |
| montage | music/rhythm | completion/replay |
| product demo | foley/sensory | hold/saves |
| brand series | sonic identity | memory/follow |

## **Model loop**

```text
Generate → Measure → Predict → Test → Learn → Reuse
```

## **Quality gates**

```text
first sound < 500 ms
voice intelligible
music does not mask speech
no lead vocal under narration
payoff has audio support
ending loops or resolves intentionally
rights source logged
synthetic disclosure status logged
```

## **Final target**

Learn:

```math
∂Retention / ∂HookAudio
∂SaveRate / ∂VoiceClarity
∂ShareRate / ∂Arousal
∂ReplayRate / ∂Loopability
∂SoundReuse / ∂TemplatePotential
```
